title: Acroceras excavatum
taxonomy: Acroceras excavatum belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification places it within the group of flowering plants known as monocots. The genus Acroceras is a part of the subfamily Panicoideae, which includes several other grass genera. Acroceras excavatum is a type of grass native to tropical regions, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family.
